intentSynonyms: show me my releases in sentry
see all my releases in sentry
list releases with optional project filter in sentry
description: List releases for the current Sentry organization. Optionally filter by project ID(s). Returns version, release date, new issue count, commit count, and deploy count.

project.description: Filter by project IDs (use list_projects to find IDs). Omit to list all releases

query.description: Filter releases by version string (partial match)

limit.description: Maximum number of releases to return (default 25, max 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
